Incident Description: Terrorists targeted a bulletproof police vehicle with an armed assault.
Armed militants shot dead tribal elder Saifullah Dawar at his residence after a dispute. Armed clashes then broke out between local tribesmen and militants.
Unknown militants destroyed the house of a police constable using explosive materials.

Location: Mir Ali area of Haider Khel
Incident Description: A quadcopter drone strike targeted the area killing a student identified as Saad.
An unknown quadcopter attack targeted and hit a local Mosque building.
A quadcopter drone strike hit a local cricket ground while sports activities were underway.
An explosion targeted a water tanker vehicle carrying water to a security forces check post.
Unidentified armed assailants opened fire and killed tribal elder Malik Zia Salarzai.
Unidentified armed individuals abducted the principal of a private school.
An improvised explosive device (IED) blast occurred in the area killing one civilian.
Terrorists opened fire on Additional SHO Mira Jan Shah's vehicle.
A police official identified as Constable Irfanullah was martyred following a gun attack.
Security forces foiled an attack by BLA militants resulting in a fatal gun battle.
Militants opened fire on a police constable serving as a security gunner for MNA Sher Afzal Khan Marwat.
A powerful explosion followed by heavy firing collapsed the roof of a religious madrassa and damaged nearby mud houses.
A security checkpost came under a heavy militant attack causing casualties among forces.
Prominent religious scholar Sheikh Muhammad Idrees lost his life in a targeted gun attack.
Two separate targeted firing incidents occurred in different tehsils of Bajaur district.

Location: Panj Gona village in Angoor Adda
Incident Description: A mortar shell fired from Afghanistan landed in a residential village killing a civilian.
Security forces carried out an intelligence-based security operation targeting a terrorist hideout.
Approximately 18-20 TTP terrorists attempted to enter the village and were repelled by local residents.
Security forces conducted an intelligence-based counter-terrorism operation against militants.

Location: Sam Banda area in Banda Daud Shah
Incident Description: Militants affiliated with the Pakistani Taliban attacked an oil field facility.
A motorcycle-borne IED exploded outside the residence of Saddam Hussain damaging the house.
Security forces conducted an intelligence-based operation eliminating a targeted terrorist.
Heavy clashes broke out as militants besieged the Zargari police check-post and Shinawari Fort.

Location: Dorri Banda Market within Daoba police limits
Incident Description: A cross-border or militant mortar shell landed near a petrol pump facility.
The CTD conducted intelligence-based operations linked to investigations of major planned attacks.
Unidentified armed assailants targeted and shot dead a police constable identified as Abdullah Bettani.
Clashes broke out between militants and security forces during a tactical field engagement.
Casualty Description: 2 people killed; 4 injured including a woman.

Incident Description: Unidentified armed men stopped and kidnapped three Rescue 1122 personnel.
Unidentified armed assailants shot and killed police constable Nazimullah while he was traveling to resume duty.
A massive explosion from an explosives-filled drum planted beneath the Ghwakhwa bridge damaged the bridge and nearby houses.
Security forces conducted an intelligence-based operation resulting in an intense exchange of fire that killed four terrorists.
Security forces killed one terrorist during a gun battle in an intelligence-based operation.
Security forces killed two Baloch militants and defused two IEDs during an intelligence-based operation.
A VBIED attack claimed by Ittehad-ul-Mujahideen Pakistan martyred 18 personnel and injured several others including civilians.
Casualty Description: 18 personnel martyred; 4 civilians (including 1 woman and 1 child) injured.

Location: Fatima Khel area near Bilal Center
Incident Description: Police carried out an operation during which a building allegedly linked to militants was set on fire.
An unidentified individual detonated a planted explosive device inside a flour shop completely destroying it.
A large-scale security operation against militants continued for a third day killing seven militants and destroying hideouts.
Militants blew up a Government Girls Primary School building using explosive devices.
Armed attackers targeted the vehicle of Additional Deputy Commissioner Habibullah Wazir while traveling to office.
Unidentified armed men opened fire and killed police officer Saeedullah.
Unidentified armed men abducted a Central Jail Police warden.
A suspected suicide bomber detonated his explosive vest when confronted by a local resident near a check post.

Location: Lora Bridge near Fateh Khel Police Check Post
Incident Description: Militants destroyed the Lora Bridge on Miranshah Road using explosive devices disrupting traffic.
A bomb blast martyred seven people including two policemen and injured 23 others.
Terrorists robbed a bank cash van and escaped with over PKR 80 million in cash.
Security forces launched an area sanitization operation engaging Baloch militants in fire exchange.
An infiltration attempt at a Scouts camp was foiled by forces leading to a clearance operation.

Location: Shad Khan Kallay in Jani Khel area
Incident Description: Police and security forces conducted a joint operation killing nine terrorists and injuring one.
A four-day operation concluding May 15 resulted in the elimination of 33 terrorists and arrest of 3 commanders.
Militants attacked mineral transport trucks and abducted four drivers belonging to Punjab.
Security forces killed two terrorists during an intelligence-based operation.
A clash between security forces and militants resulted in militant casualties and security force martyrdoms.
Casualty Description: 3 militants killed; several injured. 2 security personnel martyred.

Incident Description: Armed clashes occurred where two terrorists were killed after they had abducted four laborers.
Unidentified terrorists opened fire and martyred police constable Yasir deployed on duty.

Location: Near Absar Research Farm in Turbat
Incident Description: BLA terrorists attacked and martyred Lady Police Constable Shahkeela while injuring her husband and child.

Location: Malik Sher Jan village in Gambar area
Incident Description: A clash took place between police and TTP terrorists resulting in the killing of one terrorist.
An operation named "Avenging the Martyrs of Police" eliminated five high-value targets over 24 hours.

Location: Gharah Aslam area of Kulachi tehsil
Incident Description: Two TTP terrorists were killed during an intelligence-based operation.
Two terrorists affiliated with the TTP Kazim group were killed in a security incident.
Security forces killed four TTP terrorists during an intelligence-based fire exchange near the border.

Location: Near Darra Tang border check posts
Incident Description: TTP terrorists carried out unsuccessful quadcopter drone projectile attacks targeting border check posts.
A planted IED explosion killed tribal chief Malik Tariq and injured five other individuals.
Armed militants shot and killed a Wildlife Department employee while he was performing official duties.

Location: Near Kotka Nazar Shah in Ghazni Khel tehsil
Incident Description: Explosive material planted beneath a bridge near Dagar Kili severely damaged the roadside structure.
An unidentified quadcopter strike targeted the residence of Sher Afzal injuring six people and killing livestock.

Location: Dag Qila area of Salarzai tehsil
Incident Description: Unidentified gunmen shot dead police personnel Syed Aziz deployed for polio security duty.
In a second incident,police personnel Syed Qadir Shah assigned to polio security duty was shot dead.
Security forces killed 22 TTP terrorists during intelligence-based and area sanitization operations.

Location: Bar Khalozo area of Mamund tehsil
Incident Description: Unidentified armed men opened fire and killed police constable Imtiaz.
Terrorists destroyed a girls' primary school building using explosive devices causing severe damage.
Unidentified armed men shot and killed a Counter-Terrorism Department (CTD) official.
Intense clashes between TTP and JuA factions resulted in the death of senior commander Mumtaz Ummati and 18 militants.

Location: Chitrota Police Station in Taunsa Sharif
Incident Description: TTP terrorists targeted a police station using quadcopter drones dropping explosives that damaged the structure.
Security forces tracked down and killed terrorist mastermind Bashir and captured an associate alive.
A prolonged security operation resulted in the killing of top TTP commander Hazrat Umer alias Jan Mir and Tor Saqib along with 11 other members.
A quadcopter incident affected the local population injuring two civilian children.
ISKP claimed responsibility for targeting and killing Police Constable Ilyas with handgun fire.
